slots: Begin your Lonavala escape with sweeping views of the Western Ghats. On clear days, watch clouds drift across lush valleys and rolling hills.
Spend time at one of Lonavala's most popular spots, where cascading waters and scenic surroundings make for a refreshing experience.
Chikki shopping, local snacks, hill-town charm
Stroll through the bustling market and sample Lonavala's famous chikki while soaking in the relaxed atmosphere of the hill station.
Ancient Buddhist caves, rock-cut architecture, heritage
Explore one of India's finest Buddhist cave complexes, renowned for its grand prayer hall and remarkably preserved carvings.
Historic monuments, ancient sculptures, cultural heritage
Discover a collection of rock-cut caves that offer fascinating insights into early Buddhist life and architecture.
Watch the sun dip below the Sahyadri ranges as cool mountain breezes and panoramic views create an unforgettable evening.
Walk along ancient pathways to one of Maharashtra's best-preserved hill forts and relive stories from the Maratha era.
Unwind beside the tranquil waters of Pawna Lake, surrounded by rolling hills and picturesque countryside.
Valley overlooks, sunset views, nature experience
Conclude your journey with breathtaking views over deep valleys and dramatic cliffs, one of Lonavala's most iconic natural attractions.
